strand: Navigating the IDSR and Analyse School Performance (ASP)
gapNote: No app orientates leaders to IDSR/ASP layout, significance colouring and headline gauges.
title: IDSR Walkthrough Simulator
concept: Annotated interactive replica of an IDSR explaining quintiles, significance shading and what inspectors read first.

strand: Statistical significance and confidence intervals in accountability data
gapNote: No app explains why small cohorts produce wide confidence intervals and unstable measures.
title: Confidence Interval Visualiser
concept: Slide cohort size to show how P8 confidence intervals widen and when a result is statistically significant.

gapNote: No app produces a clear, jargon-controlled governance summary from headline data.
title: Governor Data Summary Builder
concept: Turn headline measures into a one-page RAG-rated board report with plain-English commentary prompts.

strand: Data visualisation principles and avoiding misleading charts
gapNote: No app teaches honest charting (truncated axes, dual axes, cherry-picked baselines).
title: Honest Charts Lab
concept: Toggle misleading-chart tricks on and off to train leaders to spot and avoid distortion in their own reporting.

strand: Data protection, GDPR and ethical handling of pupil data
gapNote: No app addresses lawful basis, minimisation and safeguarding when sharing pupil-level data.
title: Pupil Data Ethics Checker
concept: Scenario-based tool testing lawful basis, minimisation and anonymisation decisions before data is shared.
